segments.text: Different, prior to the fed coming into the picture, and once fed has learned the techniques and there are a lot of toolboxes, the market, corrections have become shallower and shallower.
And the ability of the Fed to manage bearish market has become better and better.
So this is something which you need to have as a first starting point to frame your situational awareness way of thinking.

Because if you are inherently a bearish person, if you are inherently somebody who is a doomsday person, right, your situational awareness is always going to be bearish, but the reality is there is 99 reason to be bullish, and there is only one reason to be bearish in the market most of
